title: 2026 Georgia's 14th congressional district special election
text: The 2026 Georgia's 14th congressional district special election was held on March 10, 2026, to fill the vacancy in Georgia's 14th congressional district. The winner will serve in the United States House of Representatives for the remainder of the 119th United States Congress, which will end on January 3, 2027. The seat became vacant on January 5, 2026, when incumbent Marjorie Taylor Greene resigned.

title: 2026 Georgia's 14th congressional district special election
text: The winner will serve in the United States House of Representatives for the remainder of the 119th United States Congress, which will end on January 3, 2027. The seat became vacant on January 5, 2026, when incumbent Marjorie Taylor Greene resigned. Under Georgia law, all candidates appeared on one ballot in the March 10 special election.

title: 2026 Georgia's 14th congressional district special election
text: The seat became vacant on January 5, 2026, when incumbent Marjorie Taylor Greene resigned. Under Georgia law, all candidates appeared on one ballot in the March 10 special election. As no candidate received more than 50% of the vote, a runoff between Republican Clayton Fuller and Democrat Shawn Harris will be held on April 7, 2026.

title: 2024 Maryland's 6th congressional district election
text: The 2024 Maryland's 6th congressional district election was held on November 5, 2024, to elect the United States representative for Maryland's 6th congressional district, concurrently with elections for the other U.S. House districts in Maryland and the rest of the country, as well as the 2024 U.S. Senate race in Maryland, other elections to the United States Senate, and various state and local elections.
